grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive right to use Proprietary Marks and System at one Location within designated Territory

fee_obligations.application_of_funds: Franchisor may apply payments to oldest obligation due

site_selection_and_construction.site_selection: Franchisee selects; franchisor approves/disapproves within 3 weeks
site_selection_and_construction.site_deadline: Must secure site within 2 months after FA signing + 30 days after approval
site_selection_and_construction.failure_consequence: Franchisor may terminate FA; no IFF refund
site_selection_and_construction.lease_approval: 20 business days; silence with lease rider = approved
site_selection_and_construction.construction_plans: Must be approved in writing before construction begins
site_selection_and_construction.sample_layout: Franchisor provides sample layout and preliminary plans
site_selection_and_construction.modifications: No modifications without advance written permission

training_obligations.initial_training: 106 hours (19 classroom + 87 OJT), ~5 days, in NYC
training_obligations.failure_consequence: One free re-enrollment; second failure = FA terminable, no IFF refund
training_obligations.ongoing_training: Annual conferences/conventions may be required; on-site training optional at $2,500/day
training_obligations.expenses: All travel, lodging, meals paid by franchisee

operational_obligations.brand_standards_compliance: Must strictly comply; franchisor can change; changes must not materially alter rights/obligations
operational_obligations.hours_of_operation: As specified in Brand Standards; may establish additional hours
operational_obligations.staffing: Must maintain competent, trained staff per Brand Standards specifications
operational_obligations.operations_manager: Required; day-to-day on-premises supervision; franchisor must approve; must complete ITP
operational_obligations.trainer: Required; responsible for staff training; must complete ITP
operational_obligations.pricing: Franchisor reserves right to impose max/min prices; may vary by region/subset of franchisees
operational_obligations.gift_cards_loyalty: Must participate in all programs at own expense; must honor other restaurants' coupons/gift cards

curable_defaults.examples: Non-payment, false reports, unauthorized sales, supplier delinquency, unauthorized mark use, advertising violations, missing permits, lease defaults, staffing failures, system change non-compliance, unsatisfied judgments

non_curable_defaults.on_notice: Failure to open within 15 months, ceasing operations 3+ days, misrepresentation, location loss, felony conviction, unauthorized transfer, non-compete violation, training failure, revenue concealment, 8%+ understatement, audit refusal, repeated defaults within 36 months, health/safety jeopardy

cross_default.description: Failure to cure breaches under this FA or any other agreement between franchisee (or affiliates) and franchisor (or affiliates) — including other FAs, ADA, lease, promissory note — is a non-curable default

noncompete.during_term: No involvement in competing business anywhere in US
noncompete.post_term: 2 years within territory, 10 miles of territory perimeter, 10 miles of any Ivan Ramen territory
noncompete.no_poach: Prohibition on employing or soliciting franchisor/affiliate employees (subject to state law)

guaranty.scope: Personal guarantee by every owner with 5% or greater interest

liquidated_damages.default_termination_damages: All expenses and damages including lost profits, lost opportunities, reputation damage, travel/personnel costs, and cost of securing new business for the territory
liquidated_damages.notes: ND and MD addenda delete consent to liquidated damages provisions

venue_and_dispute_resolution.forum: State or federal court in state/county/judicial district of franchisor's principal place of business (currently Westchester County, NY)
venue_and_dispute_resolution.injunction: Franchisor may seek in any court with jurisdiction
venue_and_dispute_resolution.attorneys_fees: Prevailing party (but structured heavily in franchisor's favor)

insurance_requirements.auto_liability: $1M per person / $2M per accident / $3M property (or greater of applicable law)

indemnification.scope: Franchisee indemnifies franchisor from certain losses and expenses (FA Section 8.10)
indemnification.limitation_indiana: Not required for franchisor's negligence or proper use of franchisor materials

force_majeure.definition: Fire, floods, natural disasters, Acts of God, war, civil commotion, terrorist acts, government acts, carrier delays, network outages, vendor failures, strikes, lockouts, similar events beyond control
force_majeure.effect: Not a breach or default if party takes reasonable mitigation steps
force_majeure.termination_right: If force majeure continues >180 days, franchisor may terminate on 30 days notice

withholding_consent_exclusive_remedy.description: Franchisee waives money damages for unreasonable withholding/delay of consent; sole remedy is action for specific performance or declaratory judgment

intellectual_property_license_back.description: Franchisee must irrevocably license to franchisor all IP, products, programs, advertising, sales methods developed for the business; franchisor not liable

no_warranty_on_approvals.description: Any franchisor waiver, approval, consent, or suggestion creates no warranty, guarantee, or liability

alcohol_restriction_law_fee_equalization.description: If state/local law restricts royalty collection on alcohol sales, non-alcohol revenue percentages increased to equalize dollar amount

social_media_prohibition.description: Franchisee may not maintain own website, URL, domain, or social media pages without prior written approval (revocable); franchisor owns all content copyrights

professional_photographs.description: Franchisor may require professional-grade photographs assigned to franchisor or provided on royalty-free, worldwide, perpetual basis; cost may be deducted from Brand Fund contributions

area_development_agreement.term: Until earlier of actual or scheduled date of last FA execution under Development Schedule
area_development_agreement.development_schedule: Mutually agreed; must comply with timetable
area_development_agreement.failure_consequence: ADA terminable; but existing FAs survive if in compliance
area_development_agreement.area_business_manager: Required; may not hold any other position; must complete ITP
area_development_agreement.death_disability: Estate has 90 days to designate successor Area Business Manager
area_development_agreement.cross_default: ADA termination gives right to terminate FAs; FA termination gives right to terminate ADA

guaranty_exhibit.unlimited: Scope not explicitly limited in Item 17 disclosures
